description: Illustrative schema for Bias in Bios-style rows (synthetic text; not from the real dataset). Real data: Hugging Face LabHC/bias_in_bios.

fields.gender: Binary or categorical sensitive attribute used for linear probing (encoding depends on loader).
fields.occupation_id: Integer 0-27 aligned with NUM_OCCUPATIONS in code.

examples.hard_text: Dr. Jane Example received a Ph.D. in computer science and works as a professor.
John Example trained as an electrician and runs a small contracting business.
